title: Add GenericRepository[T] base class with CRUD operations
description: Add src/internal/repository/base.py defining GenericRepository[T] mixin/base class usable by all domain repositories. Must provide: GenericRepository[T] with a type param T; methods: create(data: dict, tenant_id: int) -> T; get_by_id(id: int, tenant_id: int) -> Optional[T]; update(id: int, data: dict, tenant_id: int) -> Optional[T]; delete(id: int, tenant_id: int) -> bool; list(page: int, page_size: int, tenant_id: int, **filters) -> List[T]; count(tenant_id: int, **filters) -> int; _apply_tenant_filter(query, tenant_id) -> query; _apply_tenant_filter must raise PermissionError if a cross-tenant access is attempted. Depends on roadmap-db-migration-06-orm-batch2-customers-sales (all ORM models must be defined first).
acceptance: GenericRepository imported from src.internal.repository.base; isinstance(repo, GenericRepository) works; pytest tests/unit/test_repository_base.py -v has 5 tests all passing; methods return correct types; tenant isolation raises PermissionError on cross-tenant access
